args: base=${COPILOT_HOME:-$HOME/.copilot}; for d in "$base/installed-plugins/_direct/"*java-lsp-eclipse-jdt-ls "$base/plugins/"*java-lsp-eclipse-jdt-ls; do [ -x "$d/bin/launch-jdtls" ] && exec "$d/bin/launch-jdtls"; done; echo 'Error: launch-jdtls not found in plugin install directories.' >&2; exit 1
